---
title: "API reference"
toc: true
---

Per-module API documentation, organised by import path: signatures, named
tensor dimensions (shapes + glossary), and ‚Äî where the sibling
`nitrix-perf-bench` has measured a kernel ‚Äî a benchmark headline and table.
Each module links to its own page, which in turn lists one page per public
symbol.

::: {.callout-important title="Work in progress"}
These pages are **auto-generated** by `gen_reference_stubs.py` (static, from
source `__all__` + jaxtyping annotations + perf-bench reports). Signatures,
shapes, and benchmark figures are real; the per-parameter and overview **prose is
still being filled**, and coverage is expanding beyond `nitrix.stats`. Not for
final publication as-is (SPEC ¬ß6.5).
:::

## Modules

<!-- nitrix:gen index-tree -->
## `nitrix`

- [`geometry`](nitrix-geometry.qmd) ‚Äî Geometric primitives for neuroimaging.
- [`register`](nitrix-register.qmd) ‚Äî nitrix.register -- pairwise registration recipes.
- [`stats`](nitrix-stats.qmd) ‚Äî Mass-univariate statistical modelling for neuroimaging.

### `nitrix.geometry`

- [`affine`](nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd) ‚Äî Geometric-parameter affine algebra (batched, differentiable).
- [`algebra`](nitrix-geometry-algebra.qmd) ‚Äî Transform algebra: Lie-group barycentre, geodesic interpolation, fusion.
- [`coords`](nitrix-geometry-coords.qmd) ‚Äî Coordinate utilities.
- [`deformation`](nitrix-geometry-deformation.qmd) ‚Äî Deformation- and velocity-field algebra.
- [`differential`](nitrix-geometry-differential.qmd) ‚Äî Image spatial-gradient operators.
- [`grid`](nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd) ‚Äî Regular-grid deformable-registration primitives.
- [`intersection`](nitrix-geometry-intersection.qmd) ‚Äî Triangle-mesh self-intersection detection and removal.
- [`isosurface`](nitrix-geometry-isosurface.qmd) ‚Äî Volume <-> surface conversion.
- [`pyramid`](nitrix-geometry-pyramid.qmd) ‚Äî Multi-resolution Gaussian pyramid.
- [`sphere`](nitrix-geometry-sphere.qmd) ‚Äî 2-sphere primitives.
- [`sphere_grid`](nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid.qmd) ‚Äî Parameterised-sphere (regular-grid) topology helpers.
- [`surface`](nitrix-geometry-surface.qmd) ‚Äî Surface algorithms on triangle meshes.
- [`topology`](nitrix-geometry-topology.qmd) ‚Äî Mesh topology invariants -- the genus-0 defect gate.
- [`transform`](nitrix-geometry-transform.qmd) ‚Äî Lie-group parametrisation of rigid and affine transforms.

### `nitrix.register`

- [`diffeomorphic`](nitrix-register-diffeomorphic.qmd) ‚Äî Diffeomorphic registration recipe: log-domain Demons.
- [`recipes`](nitrix-register-recipes.qmd) ‚Äî Pairwise rigid / affine registration recipes.
- [`regulariser`](nitrix-register-regulariser.qmd) ‚Äî Explicit penalties on a displacement / velocity field.

### `nitrix.stats`

- [`basis`](nitrix-stats-basis.qmd) ‚Äî Penalised spline bases for additive models.
- [`betareg`](nitrix-stats-betareg.qmd) ‚Äî Beta regression for proportions in $(0, 1)$.
- [`connectivity`](nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd) ‚Äî Regularised covariance and sparse-precision estimators for connectivity.
- [`covariance`](nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd) ‚Äî Empirical covariance / correlation / partial / conditional measures.
- [`gam`](nitrix-stats-gam.qmd) ‚Äî Mass-univariate generalised additive (mixed) models.
- [`gaulss`](nitrix-stats-gaulss.qmd) ‚Äî Gaussian location-scale regression (`gaulss`).
- [`gaussian`](nitrix-stats-gaussian.qmd) ‚Äî Closed-form diagonal-Gaussian quantities.
- [`glm`](nitrix-stats-glm.qmd) ‚Äî Mass-univariate generalised linear models.
- [`glmm`](nitrix-stats-glmm.qmd) ‚Äî Mass-univariate generalised **linear mixed** models (GLMM) via PQL.
- [`gp`](nitrix-stats-gp.qmd) ‚Äî Mass-univariate Gaussian-process regression with lengthscale estimation.
- [`hgp`](nitrix-stats-hgp.qmd) ‚Äî Mass-univariate **hierarchical** Gaussian-process regression (multi-level GP).
- [`inference`](nitrix-stats-inference.qmd) ‚Äî nitrix.stats.inference -- permutation / cluster inference.
- [`lme`](nitrix-stats-lme.qmd) ‚Äî Voxelwise linear mixed-effects models.
- [`ordinal`](nitrix-stats-ordinal.qmd) ‚Äî Ordinal regression -- the cumulative-link (proportional-odds) model.
- [`pca`](nitrix-stats-pca.qmd) ‚Äî Principal-component analysis.
- [`priors`](nitrix-stats-priors.qmd) ‚Äî Lengthscale priors as REML regularisers (the `map_rho=` penalties).

#### `nitrix.stats.inference`

- [`cluster`](nitrix-stats-inference-cluster.qmd) ‚Äî Cluster maps for threshold-based enhancement and inference.
- [`multiple_comparisons`](nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd) ‚Äî Multiple-comparison corrections and multi-contrast combination for mass-univariate p-value and statistic maps.
- [`permutation`](nitrix-stats-inference-permutation.qmd) ‚Äî Exchangeability operators for permutation inference.
- [`randomise`](nitrix-stats-inference-randomise.qmd) ‚Äî Permutation inference for the general linear model.
- [`tfce`](nitrix-stats-inference-tfce.qmd) ‚Äî Threshold-free cluster enhancement.

#### `nitrix.stats.lme`

- [`flame`](nitrix-stats-lme-flame.qmd) ‚Äî FLAME-style two-level mixed-effects model for fMRI group analysis.
- [`reml`](nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd) ‚Äî Variance-components REML for voxelwise linear mixed-effects models.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
